commands.review_summary:
The PR changes main-session restart recovery to auto-resume inspectable assistant-tail transcripts by extracting the last user message, parsing structured content blocks, expanding the transcript lookup window, and adding a prompt-level idempotency guard.

PR surface: Source +217, Tests +471. Total +688 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main treats assistant tails as not resumable, sends the resend notice, and marks the session failed. I did not run a live gateway-restart reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are product policy, prompt-boundary safety, and contributor real-environment proof rather than a narrow automated cleanup.
